name: factoria
description: Factoria — Full Stack Software Factory with opinionated ADRs, policies, agents, skills and enforcement hooks for .NET, Angular, NestJS, Python (FastAPI), Python MLOps, Databricks, Kotlin, iOS Swift, and WordPress.

interface.shortDescription: Full Stack Software Factory for .NET, Angular, NestJS, Python (FastAPI), Python MLOps, Databricks, Kotlin, iOS Swift, and WordPress
interface.longDescription: Use Factoria to enforce Clean Architecture, approved ADRs, mandatory policies (security/testing/standards) and workflow skills across your full-stack projects. Supports .NET 8, Angular 16+, NestJS 11, FastAPI, Python MLOps, Databricks, Kotlin, iOS Swift, and WordPress.
defaultPrompt: I need to add a new feature to this project.
Help me create a new .NET Clean Architecture project.
